hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */infrastructure/*|*'\infrastructure\'*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; cd infrastructure || exit 2; terraform fmt -check -recursive 1>&2 || exit 2; terraform init -backend=false -input=false 1>&2 || exit 2; terraform validate 1>&2 || exit 2

out=$(make lint 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then printf '%s' "$out" | python -c "import json,sys; rc=sys.argv[1]; out=sys.stdin.read(); print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'Phase 0 exit criteria failed (make lint exit='+rc+'). Fix lint errors before finishing turn:\n\n'+out}))" "$rc"; fi; exit 0
